steps.title: Model the item count
steps.content:
The teacher orders $x$ notebooks and $y$ packs of pencils. At least $25$ items means
$$x+y\ge25$$

steps.title: Model the total cost
steps.content:
Notebooks cost $2$ dollars each and pencil packs cost $5$ dollars each, so the total cost is $2x+5y$. Not over $95$ dollars means
$$2x+5y\le95$$
